notes: POOL-LEVEL ONLY. Channel/struct lifecycle invariants are NOT modeled here — the current vocabulary covers total contract token accounting. Channel-level properties (spent ≤ deposit, expiry gating, signature authorization, status transitions) require a channel-aware model extension.

invariant_mapping.english: Total token balance held by the contract must never go negative.
Total held cannot exceed the practical supply cap for any ERC-20.

coverage.recommendation: Extend trusted core with a channel_pool model that tracks per-channel state (deposit, spent, status, payer, payee, expiry) and channel lifecycle invariants.
